title: to be loved is to be understood, but to be human is to change
description:
Use code olisunvia at https://incogni.com/olisunvia to get an exclusive 60% off!

can you be loved without being understood? at the same time, it's inevitable that people change -- often in significant and unexpected ways. love itself tends to change us. how can we resolve the tension between being understood and being a subject?
